### Regression tests

Issue #113: EOL character weirdness on Windows
(Important: first line ends with CR + CR + LF)

```````````````````````````````` example
line1
line2
.
Document scope=1:1..3:5 children=2
├── Paragraph scope=1:1..1:5 children=1
│   └── Text scope=1:1..1:5 literal="line1" children=0
└── Paragraph scope=3:1..3:5 children=1
    └── Text scope=3:1..3:5 literal="line2" children=0
````````````````````````````````

Issue #114: markdown_core skipping first character in line
(Important: the blank lines around "Repeatedly" contain a tab.)

```````````````````````````````` example
By taking it apart

- alternative solutions
→
Repeatedly solving
→
- how techniques
.
Document scope=1:1..7:16 children=4
├── Paragraph scope=1:1..1:18 children=1
│   └── Text scope=1:1..1:18 literal="By taking it apart" children=0
├── List scope=3:1..4:1 flavor=bullet start=null tight=true children=1
│   └── ListItem scope=3:1..4:1 checked=null children=1
│       └── Paragraph scope=3:3..3:23 children=1
│           └── Text scope=3:3..3:23 literal="alternative solutions" children=0
├── Paragraph scope=5:1..5:18 children=1
│   └── Text scope=5:1..5:18 literal="Repeatedly solving" children=0
└── List scope=7:1..7:16 flavor=bullet start=null tight=true children=1
    └── ListItem scope=7:1..7:16 checked=null children=1
        └── Paragraph scope=7:3..7:16 children=1
            └── Text scope=7:3..7:16 literal="how techniques" children=0
````````````````````````````````

Issue jgm/CommonMark#430:  h2..h6 not recognized as block tags.

```````````````````````````````` example
<h1>lorem</h1>

<h2>lorem</h2>

<h3>lorem</h3>

<h4>lorem</h4>

<h5>lorem</h5>

<h6>lorem</h6>
.
Document scope=1:1..11:14 children=6
├── HTMLBlock scope=1:1..1:14 literal="<h1>lorem</h1>\n" children=0
├── HTMLBlock scope=3:1..3:14 literal="<h2>lorem</h2>\n" children=0
├── HTMLBlock scope=5:1..5:14 literal="<h3>lorem</h3>\n" children=0
├── HTMLBlock scope=7:1..7:14 literal="<h4>lorem</h4>\n" children=0
├── HTMLBlock scope=9:1..9:14 literal="<h5>lorem</h5>\n" children=0
└── HTMLBlock scope=11:1..11:14 literal="<h6>lorem</h6>\n" children=0
````````````````````````````````

Issue jgm/commonmark.js#109 - tabs after setext header line


```````````````````````````````` example
hi
--→
.
Document scope=1:1..2:3 children=1
└── Heading scope=1:1..2:3 level=2 children=1
    └── Text scope=1:1..1:2 literal="hi" children=0
````````````````````````````````

Issue #177 - incorrect emphasis parsing

```````````````````````````````` example
a***b* c*
.
Document scope=1:1..1:9 children=1
└── Paragraph scope=1:1..1:9 children=2
    ├── Text scope=1:1..1:4 literal="a*" children=0
    └── Emphasis scope=1:2..1:9 children=2
        ├── Emphasis scope=1:2..1:6 children=1
        │   └── Text scope=1:5..1:5 literal="b" children=0
        └── Text scope=1:7..1:8 literal=" c" children=0
````````````````````````````````

Issue #193 - unescaped left angle brackets in link destination

```````````````````````````````` example
[a]

[a]: <te<st>
.
Document scope=1:1..3:12 children=2
├── Paragraph scope=1:1..1:3 children=1
│   └── Text scope=1:1..1:3 literal="[a]" children=0
└── Paragraph scope=3:1..3:12 children=2
    ├── Text scope=3:1..3:8 literal="[a]: <te" children=0
    └── HTML scope=3:9..3:12 literal="<st>" children=0
````````````````````````````````

Issue #192 - escaped spaces in link destination


```````````````````````````````` example
[a](te\ st)
.
Document scope=1:1..1:11 children=1
└── Paragraph scope=1:1..1:11 children=1
    └── Text scope=1:1..1:11 literal="[a](te\\ st)" children=0
````````````````````````````````

Issue github/github#76615:  multiple delimiter combinations gets sketchy


```````````````````````````````` example strikethrough
~~**_`this`_**~~  
~~***`this`***~~  
~~___`this`___~~

**_`this`_**  
***`this`***  
___`this`___

~~**_this_**~~  
~~***this***~~  
~~___this___~~

**_this_**  
***this***  
___this___
.
Document scope=1:1..15:10 children=4
├── Paragraph scope=1:1..3:16 children=7
│   ├── Strikethrough scope=1:1..1:16 children=1
│   │   └── Strong scope=1:3..1:14 children=1
│   │       └── Emphasis scope=1:5..1:12 children=1
│   │           └── Code scope=1:7..1:10 mode=embedded literal="this" children=0
│   ├── Text scope=1:17..1:18 literal="" children=0
│   ├── LineBreak scope=0:0..0:0 children=0
│   ├── Strikethrough scope=2:1..2:16 children=1
│   │   └── Emphasis scope=2:3..2:14 children=1
│   │       └── Strong scope=2:3..2:14 children=1
│   │           └── Code scope=2:7..2:10 mode=embedded literal="this" children=0
│   ├── Text scope=2:17..2:18 literal="" children=0
│   ├── LineBreak scope=0:0..0:0 children=0
│   └── Strikethrough scope=3:1..3:16 children=1
│       └── Emphasis scope=3:3..3:14 children=1
│           └── Strong scope=3:3..3:14 children=1
│               └── Code scope=3:7..3:10 mode=embedded literal="this" children=0
├── Paragraph scope=5:1..7:12 children=7
│   ├── Strong scope=5:1..5:12 children=1
│   │   └── Emphasis scope=5:3..5:10 children=1
│   │       └── Code scope=5:5..5:8 mode=embedded literal="this" children=0
│   ├── Text scope=5:13..5:14 literal="" children=0
│   ├── LineBreak scope=0:0..0:0 children=0
│   ├── Emphasis scope=6:1..6:12 children=1
│   │   └── Strong scope=6:1..6:12 children=1
│   │       └── Code scope=6:5..6:8 mode=embedded literal="this" children=0
│   ├── Text scope=6:13..6:14 literal="" children=0
│   ├── LineBreak scope=0:0..0:0 children=0
│   └── Emphasis scope=7:1..7:12 children=1
│       └── Strong scope=7:1..7:12 children=1
│           └── Code scope=7:5..7:8 mode=embedded literal="this" children=0
├── Paragraph scope=9:1..11:14 children=7
│   ├── Strikethrough scope=9:1..9:14 children=1
│   │   └── Strong scope=9:3..9:12 children=1
│   │       └── Emphasis scope=9:5..9:10 children=1
│   │           └── Text scope=9:6..9:9 literal="this" children=0
│   ├── Text scope=9:15..9:16 literal="" children=0
│   ├── LineBreak scope=0:0..0:0 children=0
│   ├── Strikethrough scope=10:1..10:14 children=1
│   │   └── Emphasis scope=10:3..10:12 children=1
│   │       └── Strong scope=10:3..10:12 children=1
│   │           └── Text scope=10:6..10:9 literal="this" children=0
│   ├── Text scope=10:15..10:16 literal="" children=0
│   ├── LineBreak scope=0:0..0:0 children=0
│   └── Strikethrough scope=11:1..11:14 children=1
│       └── Emphasis scope=11:3..11:12 children=1
│           └── Strong scope=11:3..11:12 children=1
│               └── Text scope=11:6..11:9 literal="this" children=0
└── Paragraph scope=13:1..15:10 children=7
    ├── Strong scope=13:1..13:10 children=1
    │   └── Emphasis scope=13:3..13:8 children=1
    │       └── Text scope=13:4..13:7 literal="this" children=0
    ├── Text scope=13:11..13:12 literal="" children=0
    ├── LineBreak scope=0:0..0:0 children=0
    ├── Emphasis scope=14:1..14:10 children=1
    │   └── Strong scope=14:1..14:10 children=1
    │       └── Text scope=14:4..14:7 literal="this" children=0
    ├── Text scope=14:11..14:12 literal="" children=0
    ├── LineBreak scope=0:0..0:0 children=0
    └── Emphasis scope=15:1..15:10 children=1
        └── Strong scope=15:1..15:10 children=1
            └── Text scope=15:4..15:7 literal="this" children=0
````````````````````````````````

Issue #527 - meta tags in inline contexts

```````````````````````````````` example
City:
<span itemprop="contentLocation" itemscope itemtype="https://schema.org/City">
  <meta itemprop="name" content="Springfield">
</span>
.
Document scope=1:1..4:7 children=1
└── Paragraph scope=1:1..4:7 children=7
    ├── Text scope=1:1..1:5 literal="City:" children=0
    ├── SoftBreak scope=0:0..0:0 children=0
    ├── HTML scope=2:1..2:78 literal="<span itemprop=\"contentLocation\" itemscope itemtype=\"https://schema.org/City\">" children=0
    ├── SoftBreak scope=0:0..0:0 children=0
    ├── HTML scope=3:1..3:44 literal="<meta itemprop=\"name\" content=\"Springfield\">" children=0
    ├── SoftBreak scope=0:0..0:0 children=0
    └── HTML scope=4:1..4:7 literal="</span>" children=0
````````````````````````````````

markdown-core strikethrough rules

```````````````````````````````` example strikethrough
~Hi~ Hello, world!
.
Document scope=1:1..1:18 children=1
└── Paragraph scope=1:1..1:18 children=2
    ├── Strikethrough scope=1:1..1:4 children=1
    │   └── Text scope=1:2..1:3 literal="Hi" children=0
    └── Text scope=1:5..1:18 literal=" Hello, world!" children=0
````````````````````````````````

```````````````````````````````` example strikethrough
This ~text~ ~~is~~ ~~~curious~~~.
.
Document scope=1:1..1:33 children=1
└── Paragraph scope=1:1..1:33 children=5
    ├── Text scope=1:1..1:5 literal="This " children=0
    ├── Strikethrough scope=1:6..1:11 children=1
    │   └── Text scope=1:7..1:10 literal="text" children=0
    ├── Text scope=1:12..1:12 literal=" " children=0
    ├── Strikethrough scope=1:13..1:18 children=1
    │   └── Text scope=1:15..1:16 literal="is" children=0
    └── Text scope=1:19..1:33 literal=" ~~~curious~~~." children=0
````````````````````````````````

`~` should not be escaped in href — https://github.com/github/markup/issues/311

```````````````````````````````` example
[x](http://members.aon.at/~nkehrer/ibm_5110/emu5110.html)
.
Document scope=1:1..1:57 children=1
└── Paragraph scope=1:1..1:57 children=1
    └── Link scope=1:1..1:57 destination="http://members.aon.at/~nkehrer/ibm_5110/emu5110.html" title=null children=1
        └── Text scope=1:2..1:2 literal="x" children=0
````````````````````````````````

Footnotes in tables

```````````````````````````````` example table footnotes
A footnote in a paragraph[^1]

| Column1   | Column2 |
| --------- | ------- |
| foot [^1] | note    |

[^1]: a footnote
.
Document scope=1:1..7:16 children=3
├── Paragraph scope=1:1..1:29 children=2
│   ├── Text scope=1:1..1:25 literal="A footnote in a paragraph" children=0
│   └── FootnoteReference scope=1:26..1:29 id="1" children=0
├── Table scope=3:1..5:23 alignments=[none,none] children=2
│   ├── TableRow scope=3:1..3:23 isHeader=true children=2
│   │   ├── TableCell scope=3:2..3:12 children=1
│   │   │   └── Text scope=3:3..3:9 literal="Column1" children=0
│   │   └── TableCell scope=3:14..3:22 children=1
│   │       └── Text scope=3:15..3:21 literal="Column2" children=0
│   └── TableRow scope=5:1..5:23 isHeader=false children=2
│       ├── TableCell scope=5:2..5:12 children=2
│       │   ├── Text scope=5:3..5:7 literal="foot " children=0
│       │   └── FootnoteReference scope=5:8..5:11 id="1" children=0
│       └── TableCell scope=5:14..5:22 children=1
│           └── Text scope=5:15..5:18 literal="note" children=0
└── FootnoteDefinition scope=7:7..7:16 id="1" children=1
    └── Paragraph scope=7:7..7:16 children=1
        └── Text scope=7:7..7:16 literal="a footnote" children=0
````````````````````````````````

Issue #527 - meta tags in inline contexts

```````````````````````````````` example
City:
<span itemprop="contentLocation" itemscope itemtype="https://schema.org/City">
  <meta itemprop="name" content="Springfield">
</span>
.
Document scope=1:1..4:7 children=1
└── Paragraph scope=1:1..4:7 children=7
    ├── Text scope=1:1..1:5 literal="City:" children=0
    ├── SoftBreak scope=0:0..0:0 children=0
    ├── HTML scope=2:1..2:78 literal="<span itemprop=\"contentLocation\" itemscope itemtype=\"https://schema.org/City\">" children=0
    ├── SoftBreak scope=0:0..0:0 children=0
    ├── HTML scope=3:1..3:44 literal="<meta itemprop=\"name\" content=\"Springfield\">" children=0
    ├── SoftBreak scope=0:0..0:0 children=0
    └── HTML scope=4:1..4:7 literal="</span>" children=0
````````````````````````````````

Issue #530 - link parsing corner cases

```````````````````````````````` example
[a](\ b)

[a](<<b)

[a](<b
)
.
Document scope=1:1..6:1 children=3
├── Paragraph scope=1:1..1:8 children=1
│   └── Text scope=1:1..1:8 literal="[a](\\ b)" children=0
├── Paragraph scope=3:1..3:8 children=1
│   └── Text scope=3:1..3:8 literal="[a](<<b)" children=0
└── Paragraph scope=5:1..6:1 children=3
    ├── Text scope=5:1..5:6 literal="[a](<b" children=0
    ├── SoftBreak scope=0:0..0:0 children=0
    └── Text scope=6:1..6:1 literal=")" children=0
````````````````````````````````

Issue commonmark#526 - unescaped ( in link title

```````````````````````````````` example
[link](url ((title))
.
Document scope=1:1..1:20 children=1
└── Paragraph scope=1:1..1:20 children=1
    └── Text scope=1:1..1:20 literal="[link](url ((title))" children=0
````````````````````````````````

Issue commonamrk#517 - script, pre, style close tag without
opener.

```````````````````````````````` example
</script>

</pre>

</style>
.
Document scope=1:1..5:8 children=3
├── HTMLBlock scope=1:1..1:9 literal="</script>\n" children=0
├── HTMLBlock scope=3:1..3:6 literal="</pre>\n" children=0
└── HTMLBlock scope=5:1..5:8 literal="</style>\n" children=0
````````````````````````````````

Issue #289.

```````````````````````````````` example
[a](<b) c>
.
Document scope=1:1..1:10 children=1
└── Paragraph scope=1:1..1:10 children=1
    └── Text scope=1:1..1:10 literal="[a](<b) c>" children=0
````````````````````````````````

Pull request #128 - Buffer overread in tables extension

```````````````````````````````` example table
|
-|
.
Document scope=1:1..2:2 children=1
└── Paragraph scope=1:1..2:2 children=3
    ├── Text scope=1:1..1:1 literal="|" children=0
    ├── SoftBreak scope=0:0..0:0 children=0
    └── Text scope=2:1..2:2 literal="-|" children=0
````````````````````````````````

Footnotes may be nested inside other footnotes.

```````````````````````````````` example footnotes
This is some text. It has a citation.[^citation]

[^another-citation]: My second citation.

[^citation]: This is a long winded parapgraph that also has another citation.[^another-citation]
.
Document scope=1:1..5:96 children=3
├── Paragraph scope=1:1..1:48 children=2
│   ├── Text scope=1:1..1:37 literal="This is some text. It has a citation." children=0
│   └── FootnoteReference scope=1:38..1:48 id="citation" children=0
├── FootnoteDefinition scope=3:22..4:0 id="another-citation" children=1
│   └── Paragraph scope=3:22..3:40 children=1
│       └── Text scope=3:22..3:40 literal="My second citation." children=0
└── FootnoteDefinition scope=5:14..5:96 id="citation" children=1
    └── Paragraph scope=5:14..5:96 children=2
        ├── Text scope=5:14..5:77 literal="This is a long winded parapgraph that also has another citation." children=0
        └── FootnoteReference scope=5:78..5:96 id="another-citation" children=0
````````````````````````````````

Footnotes are similar to, but should not be confused with, link references

```````````````````````````````` example footnotes
This is some text. It has two footnotes references, side-by-side without any spaces,[^footnote1][^footnote2] which are definitely not link references.

[^footnote1]: Hello.

[^footnote2]: Goodbye.
.
Document scope=1:1..5:22 children=3
├── Paragraph scope=1:1..1:150 children=4
│   ├── Text scope=1:1..1:84 literal="This is some text. It has two footnotes references, side-by-side without any spaces," children=0
│   ├── FootnoteReference scope=1:85..1:96 id="footnote1" children=0
│   ├── FootnoteReference scope=1:97..1:108 id="footnote2" children=0
│   └── Text scope=1:109..1:150 literal=" which are definitely not link references." children=0
├── FootnoteDefinition scope=3:15..4:0 id="footnote1" children=1
│   └── Paragraph scope=3:15..3:20 children=1
│       └── Text scope=3:15..3:20 literal="Hello." children=0
└── FootnoteDefinition scope=5:15..5:22 id="footnote2" children=1
    └── Paragraph scope=5:15..5:22 children=1
        └── Text scope=5:15..5:22 literal="Goodbye." children=0
````````````````````````````````

Footnotes may begin with or have a 'w' or a '_' in their reference label.

```````````````````````````````` example footnotes autolink
This is some text. Sometimes the autolinker splits up text into multiple nodes, hoping it will find a hyperlink, so this text has a footnote whose reference label begins with a `w`.[^widely-cited]

It has another footnote that contains many different characters (the autolinker was also breaking on `_`).[^sphinx-of-black-quartz_judge-my-vow-0123456789]

[^sphinx-of-black-quartz_judge-my-vow-0123456789]: so does this.

[^widely-cited]: this renders properly.
.
Document scope=1:1..7:39 children=4
├── Paragraph scope=1:1..1:196 children=4
│   ├── Text scope=1:1..1:177 literal="This is some text. Sometimes the autolinker splits up text into multiple nodes, hoping it will find a hyperlink, so this text has a footnote whose reference label begins with a " children=0
│   ├── Code scope=1:179..1:179 mode=embedded literal="w" children=0
│   ├── Text scope=1:181..1:181 literal="." children=0
│   └── FootnoteReference scope=1:182..1:196 id="widely-cited" children=0
├── Paragraph scope=3:1..3:155 children=4
│   ├── Text scope=3:1..3:101 literal="It has another footnote that contains many different characters (the autolinker was also breaking on " children=0
│   ├── Code scope=3:103..3:103 mode=embedded literal="_" children=0
│   ├── Text scope=3:105..3:106 literal=")." children=0
│   └── FootnoteReference scope=3:107..3:155 id="sphinx-of-black-quartz_judge-my-vow-0123456789" children=0
├── FootnoteDefinition scope=5:52..6:0 id="sphinx-of-black-quartz_judge-my-vow-0123456789" children=1
│   └── Paragraph scope=5:52..5:64 children=1
│       └── Text scope=5:52..5:64 literal="so does this." children=0
└── FootnoteDefinition scope=7:18..7:39 id="widely-cited" children=1
    └── Paragraph scope=7:18..7:39 children=1
        └── Text scope=7:18..7:39 literal="this renders properly." children=0
````````````````````````````````

Footnotes interacting with strikethrough should not lead to a use-after-free

```````````````````````````````` example footnotes autolink strikethrough table
|Tot.....[^_a_]|
.
Document scope=1:1..1:16 children=1
└── Paragraph scope=1:1..1:16 children=3
    ├── Text scope=1:1..1:9 literal="|Tot....." children=0
    ├── FootnoteReference scope=1:10..1:15 id="_a_" children=0
    └── Text scope=1:16..1:16 literal="|" children=0
````````````````````````````````

Footnotes interacting with strikethrough should not lead to a use-after-free pt2

```````````````````````````````` example footnotes autolink strikethrough table
[^~~is~~1]
.
Document scope=1:1..1:10 children=1
└── Paragraph scope=1:1..1:10 children=1
    └── FootnoteReference scope=1:1..1:10 id="~~is~~1" children=0
````````````````````````````````

Adjacent unused footnotes definitions should not lead to a use after free

```````````````````````````````` example footnotes autolink strikethrough table
Hello world


[^a]:[^b]:
.
Document scope=1:1..4:10 children=2
├── Paragraph scope=1:1..1:11 children=1
│   └── Text scope=1:1..1:11 literal="Hello world" children=0
└── FootnoteDefinition scope=4:6..4:10 id="a" children=1
    └── FootnoteDefinition scope=4:11..4:10 id="b" children=0
````````````````````````````````

Issue #424 - emphasis before links

```````````````````````````````` example
*text* [link](#section)
.
Document scope=1:1..1:23 children=1
└── Paragraph scope=1:1..1:23 children=3
    ├── Emphasis scope=1:1..1:6 children=1
    │   └── Text scope=1:2..1:5 literal="text" children=0
    ├── Text scope=1:7..1:7 literal=" " children=0
    └── Link scope=1:8..1:23 destination="#section" title=null children=1
        └── Text scope=1:9..1:12 literal="link" children=0
````````````````````````````````
